Unused config declarations emit no FABRIK_ENV resolution or load options.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/config.go --
package shared

//fabrik:config http
type Config struct {
	Addr string `yaml:"addr" default:":8080"`
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() int {
	if err := func() error {
		// Providers
		r := router.New()

		// Register
		r.Method("GET", "/", web.Index)
		return nil
	}(); err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return 0
}
-- want/diags --
warning: shared/config.go:3:1: config struct Config is never used
  help: inject it into a provider, hook, or handler struct, or remove the directive
